name: rad-coolify-orchestrator
description: End-to-end Coolify self-hosted PaaS management — 8 skills covering deployments (Nixpacks/Dockerfile/Compose), databases, security, CI/CD, troubleshooting, observability, multi-server infrastructure, and live MCP-backed actions; coolify-reviewer agent (Opus 4.7 default) with 4 Python validators (lint-dockerfile, lint-compose, check-coolify-env, audit-cicd) that catch the patterns LLM eyeballing misses; bundled @radoriginllc/coolify-mcp (27 verified tools) for live operations against your Coolify instance. Covers Coolify v4 self-hosted (currently v4.0.0-beta.474, rolling beta). Honest about what's experimental (Sentinel, Swarm, Caddy proxy, Railpack-NOT-yet-shipped) and what's production-ready.
